collection_scope.reason: Collect worldwide first so long-tail growth signals are not lost. Limit visual emphasis at display time, not at collection time.

default_display.rule: Home charts show major countries first, then emerging top movers, then Other.

special_jurisdictions.note: EP is not a country. Keep it visible as a major patent office and explain it in tooltips.
WO/PCT is not a continent or national office. Use it as a separate international filing route signal.

display_rules: Do not show every country on the first screen.
Home heatmap defaults to US, EP, CN, JP, KR, top emerging countries, and Other.
Region view shows all regions with drill-down to countries.
Country view allows exact country filtering and separates publication-country from assignee-country basis.
Long-tail cards surface countries with high recent growth but low absolute count.
Tooltips must explain that EP and WO are special jurisdictions, not ordinary countries.
